TextENGNew: But still...
I muttered to myself, while looking at Rena from the side.
While Rena and I were having a discussion about the dessert we just ate, Shion arrived with some coffee.
``...Oh.@k@vS19/06/500600221. ...Um, did the two little ones leave already?``
Hearing them called the little ones was so strange, I inadvertently burst out laughing.
``Ahahaha!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI18850. Apparently they were in the middle of cleaning, so they went home.``
Shion had brought enough coffee for four people.
``I heard from my senior.@k@vS19/06/500600223. ...It seems that you... went through a lot of trouble for my sake...``

``It was no trouble at all.@k@vS19/02/500200248. None other than Shii-chan was in a pinch, after all.@k@vS19/02/500200249. ...Oh, is it all right if I call you Shii-chan?@k@vS19/02/500200250. It matches with Mii-chan so I thought it'd be kyute!``
``Ah... well... whatever you want...``
Shion seemed a bit hesitant when Rena started talking to her.
Rena is pretty sharp about some things, so Shion was probably worried that Rena would find out she was Mion after talking like this.
Shion said she'd have work soon and hurried off back to the kitchen, leaving behind coffee for just the two of us.
``She was a bit upset with Rena.@k@vS19/02/500200252. Maybe she thought I was being too friendly... Hau...``
``She's just embarrassed.``
``Still, they really do look the same.@k@vS19/02/500200254. Instead of twins, it's like there's another Mii-chan.``
``They look the same, but the atmosphere around them, or rather, their insides are completely different.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI18880. I think those types of twins are pretty interesting though~.``
``You think that, Keiichi-kun?@k@vS19/02/500200256. ...I think they're identical on the inside too.``
It somehow became silent.
Rena was just staring at the pattern the milk made on the surface of her coffee without saying a word.
...For somebody like me who could never stop talking, it was a rather uncomfortable moment.
Rena's offput mannerisms seemed to imply I said something I shouldn't have.
That unpleasantness carried on for a little while.
``...Rena.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI18900. You said it today, right?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI18910. That Mion was hurting...``
``Did I say something like that...?``
``Don't play dumb with me!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI18930. You definitely said it. On the way home from school.``
Rena answered by laughing while continuing to play dumb, questioning if she said that...
As thick-headed as I was... I had a faint realization.
Rena wanted to say that I was the one who hurt Mion.@k ...But, when?@k Me?
``Hypothetically... ...If something like that happened...@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI18950. It's not something I did out of malice.``
I continued the conversation, but left out the assumption that I had hurt Mion.
``Yeah.@k@vS19/02/500200259. I think that's true.@k@vS19/02/500200260. I don't think Keiichi-kun had any bad intentions.``
Rena replied, also leaving out the assumption that I had hurt Mion...@k but that confirmed it.
I don't know how it happened... but it seemed that I had hurt Mion...@k and Rena was upset with me due to the fact I hadn't realized it...
``I don't want you to misunderstand, it's not like Rena is mad at you.``
Seeing right through what I was thinking, Rena said that as she smiled even more gently than usual.
``It's just that... How do I say this...@k@vS19/02/500200263. It's hard...``

``...If I made a mistake, please say so clearly.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI18970. I'm so thick-headed I disgust even myself.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI18980. ...If there's something I should apologize for, then I'd want to know even a little quicker so I can make up for it.``
``I don't think that Keiichi-kun made a mistake.@k@vS19/02/500200265. Depending on how you look at it... Mii-chan might be the one who's being unfair.``
``Taking the stance that the girl was the one being unfair might be unfair in itself.``
What Rena said was draped in mystery... unfortunately I had no idea what she meant.
The only thing I got out of it was that I had said or done something to inadvertently hurt Mion.

``...I'm begging you, Rena.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19000. ...Mion is one of my best friends.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19010. I don't want to leave something between us that could cause problems later on.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19020. ...So tell me.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19030. How did I hurt her...?``
``I can't tell you.@k@vS19/02/500200268. You need to realize something like this for yourself.``
Rena was smiling like she always did, but spoke bluntly.
...The fact that she had this strength of will surprised me for a moment.
``...I'm asking you because I can't figure it out, you know!?``
My tone had unintentionally become harsh.
Rena was also surprised for a moment, but quickly returned to her flat demeanor.
``Well then, I guess just a hint is fine.@k@vS19/02/500200270. This is special, okay?``
``...Sorry.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19060. Please.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19070. I'll think about this seriously.``
Rena looked around the restaurant, searching for Shion.
Shion was working enthusiastically, but without confidence as usual.
``Shii-chan, if she ties her hair up, is impossible to tell apart from Mii-chan, right?``
``Yeah, that's true.``
``So then.@k@vS19/02/500200273. So if Mii-chan let down her hair, would she be impossible to tell apart from Shii-chan?``
``Probably.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19100. ...But what does that have to do with anything?``
``What if...@k@vS19/02/500200275. What if that her being the younger twin was a lie, that she was just Mii-chan pretending to be her sister. What would you think?``
...Rena was sharper than her daily behavior belied.
I was hesitant in verbally affirming that, but it was the right answer.
``It might be unfair to answer a question with another question.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19120. ...But if like you say, Mion is just pretending to be Shion... what purpose would that serve?``
After maintaining the silence for a while, Rena glanced at the clock.
``That's what I want you to think about.@k@vS19/02/500200277. ...Hmmm, that was maybe too much of a hint. ...Hau.``
After thanking me for the dessert, Rena stood up from her seat.
``Sorry. I was asked to buy a few things, so it's about time I left.
Is it okay with you if you tell Shion I'm sorry I didn't say goodbye?``
``Yeah, I'll tell her...``
``Sorry.``
``That Rena is so short-tempered.@k@vS19/02/500200282. ...Sorry for getting angry.@k@vS19/02/500200283. Keiichi-kun isn't the only one at fault here.``
Rena was harsh in her apology, but I was the one who really should have apologized.
``I think to Mii-chan, it's something that doesn't bother her much anymore.@k@vS19/02/500200285. So if you want to forget the whole thing happened, that's fine too.
...But you see, as a girl, I'd hope that Keiichi-kun realizes it by himself and comes to apologize of his own volition.``
Switching to Kyute Mode only at the end, she disappeared in the direction of the register.
While Rena and I were having a discussion about the dessert we just ate, Shion arrived with some coffee.
``...Oh.@k@vS19/06/660600162. ...Um, did the two little ones leave already?``
Hearing them called the little ones was so strange, I inadvertently burst out laughing.
``Ahahaha!@k@vS19/02/660200199. Apparently they were in the middle of cleaning, so they went home.``
Shion had brought enough coffee for four people.
``I heard from my senior.@k@vS19/06/660600164. ...It seems that you... went through a lot of trouble for my sake...``

``It was no trouble at all.@k@vS19/02/660200201. None other than Shii-chan was in a pinch, after all.@k@vS19/02/660200202. ...Oh, is it all right if I call you Shii-chan?@k@vS19/02/660200203. It matches with Mii-chan so I thought it'd be kyute!``
``Ah... well... whatever you want...``
Shion seemed a bit hesitant when Rena started talking to her.
Rena is pretty sharp about some things, so Shion was probably worried that Rena would find out she was Mion after talking like this.
Shion said she'd have work soon and hurried off back to the kitchen, leaving behind coffee for just the two of us.
``She was a bit upset with Rena.@k@vS19/02/660200205. Maybe she thought I was being too friendly...@k@vS19/02/660200206. Hau...``
``She's just embarrassed.``
``But still, they really look so alike...``
I mumbled to myself as I poured milk into my coffee.
``They really do.@k@vS19/02/660200208. It's like they're not just twins, but there's actually just another Mii-chan.``
``But man...@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19180. When is Mion going to stop pretending she has a twin sister...?``
Rena's stilled her hand that was reaching for the sugar pot and just looked up at towards me.
``Keiichi-kun, what do you mean by that?``
``I mean... that's obviously Mion, right?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19200. And isn't it weird in the first place that nobody knew she had a twin sister up until now?``
``I know, but...@k@vS19/02/660200212. you really think Mii-chan and Shii-chan are the same person, then? Then?``
``Indeed.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19220. You know Mion's personality. She probably just doesn't want everyone to know that she has a part time job here.``
I also add in the fact that she was terribly embarrassed when we first spoke at Angel Mort.
I mean, it's a shop with girls in cute uniforms. It's more than natural for Mion to feel embarrassed.
``That's why I think that Mion made a desperation play and created the persona of Shion that she's acting out.``
Rena gives me an utterly baffled stare.
Of course she would. I would do the same if I found out the person I just introduced myself to was actually my friend pretending to be someone else.
``...And that's why Shion was so curt with you earlier. She was hiding her embarrassment.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19250. Because you would've found out if you she talked more to you.``
``So, Rena, try not to mind that side of Mion...``
``But why?``
Rena's face had suddenly turned serious.
``Why would Mii-chan keep pretending to be Shii-chan?``
``Because she is embarassed?``
``Why would she be embarrassed?``
Rena is being pretty contrarian today. Yet, stumped for an answer, I drop my gaze to the corner of the table.
``Why would she be embarrassed? Why?``
``...Dunno.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19300. This is Mion we're talking about. Maybe she just thinks girly clothes don't fit her.``
With that, Rena fell silent again.
Oh man... What's she thinking about this time?
``...Yeah, I bet that's it.``
``What is what?``
``Well...@k@vS19/02/660200221. The reason she's pretending to be Shii-chan.``
Another riddle.
I feel like she said something similarly profound this afternoon, too. Something about how I should know the reason why Mion is acting strange lately...
But I'm not kidding. I seriously have no clue.
``It's so sad~~~...☆``
``Yeah, it sure sucks to be me...``
I said with a sigh, when Rena gave me a chastizing glare.
``It's Mii-chan I feel sad for, not you!``
``Why would you feel sad for Mion?``
Rena takes a long hard look at my face and sighed again.
There's obviously something Rena is wanting to say to me. Yet, all she does is spout these mysterious words while refusing to tell me what they mean.
But why? There has to be some kind of reason...!
But not only do I not know what it is she's trying to tell me, I also have no way of knowing why she can't tell me. The only thing I do know is that Rena has noticed something I've overlooked.
Rena smiled even more gently than usual. I must've looked quite at my wits' end.
``There's no point unless you find out for yourself, Keiichi-kun.``
``But I can't, that's why we're having this discussion!``
Rena pulled back, startled, after I unintentionally raised my voice.
``...I-I'm sorry.``
``Then maybe just a small hint.@k@vS19/02/660200226. Just this time, okay?``
Rena glanced around the store, looking for Shion. She was working hard, delivering cakes to customers.
``When is Mii-chan pretending to be Shii-chan?``
``...?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19380. While she's doing her job?``
Rena is silently waiting for the rest of my sentence. ...But was there really any other time Mion was pretending to be Shion, other than when she was working?
Rena looked at her watch and suddenly stood up.
``Maybe I gave too much of a hint.@k@vS19/02/660200229. But I've got something to do, so I'll be going now.``
``*Too much* of a hint? I still don't understand anything!``
``Keiichi-kun, you really need to sit down and think, okay?@k@vS19/02/660200231. Hmm... I'm giving you way too many hints, now.``
Rena teases me by switching to Kyute Mode at the very end, then disappears into the direction of the register.
I just sat there mindlessly until suddenly, someone taps me on the shoulder.
``Sorry to keep you waiting...@k@vS19/06/500600226. Ehehe... I'm finally done.``
It was Shion, who had changed into her casual outfit.
She seemed tired from work, yet showed me a buoyant smile.
``Thanks a lot for today.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19410. Everything was super delicious.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19420. The rest loved it too.``
``Oh no, don't mention it.@k@vS19/06/500600228. ...but I'm glad all of you had fun.@k@vS19/06/500600229. ...Huh?@k@vS19/06/500600230. Did that girl from before leave as well?``
``She said she some shopping to do.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19440. She did feel pretty sorry about leaving early, though.``
``I see.``
``...Well then, should we head on out, too?@k@vS19/06/500600233. Even though I'm off work, I still get nervous around the workplace☆.``
We ended up strolling around without any destination in particular.
I'd been wanting to get a breath of fresh air anyway, since I spent so much time sitting still.
When we left, the sky had already become draped in a veil of darkness.
``Aaaaahh.@k@vS19/06/500600235. It's gotten dark already.@k@vS19/06/500600236. ...Even though I promised I'd be finished early.``
Shion seemed upset that there wasn't much time left.
``Oh well.@k@vS19/06/500600238. At least we've got a little time to chat like this.``
Saying that, Shion set out for the tree-lined boulevard behind the station.
The front of the station was slowly becoming crowded with businessmen heading home.

``Well then.@k@vS19/06/500600240. I guess I should start with an introduction.@k@vS19/06/500600241. ...I was mistaken for my sister when we first met, so we never got to properly introduce ourselves.``
I could only smile and laugh wryly.

``My name is Shion Sonozaki.@k@vS19/06/500600243. I'm only similar to my older sister in appearance.@k@vS19/06/500600244. My sister is rough around the edges and hot-headed, but I'm a composed and methodical person.``
I remembered what Rena and I had been talking about earlier.
I said that they looked the same but their personalities were different, while Rena said they were both the same.
I don't know what tipped her off, but Rena figured out that Shion was Mion.
Also, related to that, she said that I had hurt Mion.
Rena had given only one hint.
That was: why is Mion pretending to be Shion?
``Shion, what did you hear about me from Mion?``

``My sister seems to have taken a liking to you.@k@vS19/06/500600246. She talks about you quite a bit.@k@vS19/06/500600247. Like about club activities, about getting pranked and pranking you back. Boyish kinds of stories.@k@vS19/06/500600248. ...You really do get along.``
Boyish kind of stories,' huh.
Come to think of it, I think there was something Shion told me before.
``Kei-chan, you don't think of my sister as a girl, do you~?``
...Was that... was that what happened that hurt Mion?
Mion herself said that she wished she'd been born a boy, and that being a girl didn't suit her. She said a lot of things to that effect, didn't she...?
``...Kei-chan, you look like you're having fun.``
``Huh? ...Ah, no! That's not true.``
``Even though you're bad at hiding things, you sure like to lie, don't you?@k@vS19/06/500600251. Still, I don't hate you for it.``
Saying that, she lightly chopped my forehead.
...Even though Shion was enjoying herself, I was still trying to figure out how I had hurt Mion.@k I was having a hard time figuring out the riddle that Rena had left me with...
``Hey, see that? Don't you think it's pretty? You think even a guy would find it pretty?``
``Hmmm.... yeah, it is pretty!``
Shion was having fun window shopping, dragging me by all sorts of stores I would normally never enter.
It wasn't like she was begging me to buy her anything, and I wasn't getting bored, either.
It was just something to talk about as we walked around.
In an easy-going way, we browsed through numerous stores.
We discussed all sorts of topics I knew nothing about, but I didn't lose interest.@k I had the feeling she was good at conversation.
``Kei-chan, is this your first time doing this kind of thing?``
``Yeah, it is.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19490. If somebody didn't bring me into these accessory shops, I don't think I'd set foot in one my entire life.``
``...Not that... I meant, more like this.``
Bwah!?
I leapt back when Shion suddenly linked her arm with mine.
``Hey... you don't have to act so surprised.``
``It's not so embarrassing to link arms with a girl, is it?``
Shion's expression was a little bit miffed, but suggestive at the same time.
``I-I-I-I-I'm not that embarrassed!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19510. If you want some arms I can spare one or two.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19520. ...Here!``
``Hehehe...!@k@vS19/06/500600258. Kei-chan, you really know how to entertain someone.@k@vS19/06/500600259. I see why my sister took a liking to you.``
``I-If you don't want my arm, I'm taking it back!``
``Ahahahahaha!@k@vS19/06/500600261. Awww, c'mon~.@k@vS19/06/500600262. I'm happy to have it~!``
Laughing in good spirits, Shion locked her arm with mine. ...My heart skipped a beat.

``This question might be a bit mean, but I want to enjoy seeing your reaction. Kei-chan, have you ever been arm-in-arm with a girl before?@k@vS19/06/500600264. Around a bonfire at a field trip doesn't count, by the way.``
...That little devil!!@k She was asking that question knowing full well what the answer would be!
``...Well, if field trips are out... ...This is rough.``
``Hehehehe...!!@k@vS19/06/500600266. I thought as much~.``
``That impish laugh, it really is the same as Mion's!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19560. You really are Shion, right?``
``You're not just Mion saying that you're Shion, are you?``
``Are you thinking that my sister might pretend to be me?``
``I thought you were twins until just now, but that way you mess around is just like Mion!``
``You're just saying that.@k@vS19/06/500600269. You can tell us apart easily.``
``What do you mean by that?``
``If my sister was holding your arm like this, would you get nervous?``
``I would.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19610. I'd be completely on edge worrying about when she would go for an armlock.``
``Ahahahahaha!``
Shion laughed so hard she had to hold on to her sides.
``Hey, hey, is it really that funny?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19630. You're tearing up.``

``No, no... It's just...@k@vS19/06/500600273. I was just thinking about how hopeless my sister is.@k@vS19/06/500600274. She isn't even able to get a young man hot and bothered while she's arm in arm with him.@k@vS19/06/500600275. She really is a failure as a woman.``
I remembered once again that I'd heard someone say that before.
``Sometimes I think that my sister would have been better off if she'd been born a boy.@k@vS19/06/500600277. ...If she did, I might have fallen for her.``
``Just kidding~! Ahahahahahaha!``
``...Mion did say something about wanting to be born a boy.``

``My sister is on the fence as to whether she wants to be a boy or a girl.@k@vS19/06/500600280. Well, it's the price she pays for living an awkward lifestyle.@k@vS19/06/500600281. Just leave her be.``
``You've been saying some pretty harsh things about your sister right now.``
``Mion has some soft parts to her that I don't like.``
The way that Shion talked somehow sounded cold.
``Shion, do you not get along with Mion?``
``Well, we get along well enough.``
``Still, there's a few things for which I can't forgive her, as her sister.``
``...Hey, look at that!@k@vS19/06/500600286. Don't you think it's cute...?``
I looked in the direction that Shion pointed.
And there, I found...
I turned around to look at where Shion was pointing... what was there was the familiar display window of a toy shop.
The same shop that was the stage for the incident that occurred during last Sunday's club activities.
What Shion was pointing at was a display with a plethora of adorable dolls that looked like the sort girls would like.
``I wonder why girls like these kinds of things.``
``It's because they're cute.@k@vS19/06/500600288. Don't you think they're cute, Kei-chan?``
``...I'm a man, so I don't really get that vibe.``
``Now, now.@k@vS19/06/500600290. Which one do you think is the cutest out of all these, Kei-chan?``
Shion, pulling on my arm, motioned to the row of dolls.
...They were lined up like they were close sisters taking a commemorative photo.
A few of them seemed strangely familiar.
``...I've seen those four over there somewhere.``
``Oh, I guess they really are famous...@k@vS19/06/500600292. if even you know about them.``
Shion sounded impressed.

``These are new dolls that were just brought in from England.@k@vS19/06/500600294. They still have some available here, but around the cities they have trouble keeping them on the shelves. Even though they're supposed to be inexpensive, it seems they're starting to come at a premium.``
``I guess girls still like these kinds of things even as they grow up.``
``It depends on the person, but I think that girls who don't like dolls and stuffed animals are pretty few and far between.@k@vS19/06/500600296. Even my tomboy of a sister said these were adorable.``
``Oh?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19720. Even Mion says they're adorable. That *is* pretty amazing.``
That's right, I just remembered.
The store owner gave this one to us after Sunday's event.
Except for Mion, who was a relative, everybody had gotten something.
``I really do think that one's the best...@k@vS19/06/500600298. That frilly dress really gives it something...``
``...That's it.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19740. That's the one the shop owner gave to me.``
``So it seems.``
Shion replied softly, but clearly.
``Uncle Yoshirou gave those out as thanks for helping liven things up at Sunday's event.@k@vS19/06/500600301. It seems he gave them to the four friends my sister brought along.``
``So, you got the doll with the dress then.@k@vS19/06/500600303. ...What did you think?@k@vS19/06/500600304. It was really cute, right?``
...As a man, there's no way I'd think it was cute.
``So, what did you do with the doll?``
``I wasn't really going to do anything with it, so I gave it to someone.``
To who?
As Shion laughed, I could hear an audible click run through my head, like the piece of a jigsaw puzzle snapping into place...
``Thank you very much for today, everyone.@k@vS19/00/mas99005. You made the event turn out great~!@k@vS19/00/mas99006. It's not much, but here's something extra for today~.``
``Ah! Uncle Yoshirou!@k@vS19/03/990300470. Isn't there a little something for me, too?``
``My my my!!@k@vS19/04/990400206. Quite an adorable one, is it not!?``
When Satoko and Rika-chan opened up the bag, there were cute little stuffed animals inside.
``Which means, there's something for me, too?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19770. ...Woah.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19780. I got a pretty adorable one.``
It was a stuffed toy wearing a beautiful dress. One you'd use to play house.
Rena's eyes were glued to my stuffed doll! ...Satoko was the same, and Rika-chan too...!?
...I see.
It wasn't just Rena, Satoko, and Rika-chan.
...There was one other person who seemed jealous.
``Ahahaha!@k@vS19/03/500300187. Kei-chan got the one that fits him the least!``
...Not wanting for her expression to give it away, she had said that to hide her embarrassment.
``...Well, I guess it's cute and pretty... I can admit, it's adorable... but a doll with changeable clothes is... eh...``
``If you walked around with it, then you'd be treated like a weirdo starting tomorrow. Definitely!``
...Mion's usual teasing way of talking.
I looked around to see who I should give the doll to.
Mion was right in front of me.
Mion was the only one who hadn't received a present, so I thought about giving it to her.@k ...But I didn't.
Turning away from Mion's covetous gaze, I gave the doll to Rena.
Mion's smile bore into my back.@k ...There was no way I couldn't have noticed.
Why did I not give it to Mion...?
Since Mion was the only one who didn't get anything, wouldn't it have just been standard practice to give it to her...?
At that time, I had noticed that something was wrong.
That's why I said it.
``Just protecting myself.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19810. ...If I didn't give it to Rena, then walking the streets at night would be scary.``
``Ahahaha!!@k@vS19/03/500300190. No doubt! No doubt!``
``I thought about giving it to Mion, but it just didn't feel right!``
Something dark flickered briefly in Mion's eyes, but at the time I didn't notice it.
I had thought to give it to Mion... Why didn't I?
``Heh heh heh, you know it!@k@vS19/03/500300192. I sometimes wonder why I wasn't born a boy.``
Mion herself had said that with a laugh, so I didn't realize that I had hurt her.
``That's right. Mion is more suited for cool things!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19870. So I think having you help out here was the right choice.``

``That's right!@k@vS19/03/660300190. We look similar, but our personalities are completely different!@k@vS19/03/660300191. I'm very kind and thoughtful, but Shion has a cold and scary personality...!``
``...I think that when you guys were born, Shion got all the feminine aspects.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI19890. Unlike Mion, she's a cute, cheerful girl.``
Mion made a strange face that was both angry and happy at the same time.
It seemed she was happy that I said Shion was cute.
Sneaking a look inside the box, to say that she just put some of the leftovers inside would have been a lie. There was an elegant meal stuffed inside.

Shion,' saying that, pouted cutely...
``Wha-Wha-Wha-Wha-Wha-Wha-What is going on...@k@vS19/03/660300197. Tell me... Shion...!``
``Not much.@k@vS19/06/660600216. I was wondering what kind of person this Kei-chan you were so infatuated with was.@k@vS19/06/660600217. So I happened to give him a ticket to the Dessert Festa.

...There, when I was being bothered by all sorts of troublesome customers, Kei-chan gallantly appeared...@k@vS19/06/660600219. ...and saved me by kicking them all to the curb... or something like that.``
``WhaaaaaaaaaaaaaaAAAAaaaa~~...!?!?``
Both Mion and I raised our voices pathetically, expressing our confusion to the utmost.
``...Mion... You phoned me...@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI20910. ...yesterday, right?``
``...I didn't.@k@vS19/03/660300200. ...I have no idea what you're talking about...``
``I delivered that bento for you, didn't I, Kei-chan?@k@vS19/06/660600221. That was me, right?``

``Or was it my sister?@k@vS19/06/660600223. The person known as Mion Sonozaki put together a bento, and bravely went to a boy's home to deliver it, maybe?@k@vS19/06/660600224. Ohh, you're a lot bolder than you look, sis~!``
With a loud pop, a trail of smoke started to rise from Mion's head...
``No, I... I don't know I don't know...!``
``See, Kei-chan.@k@vS19/06/500600342. My sister says she doesn't know.@k@vS19/06/500600343. So everything up until yesterday was me, Shion Sonozaki.``
``You might have thought it was my sister pretending to be me, but with this, there's no doubt, right?``
...I couldn't tell up from down at that moment...
If there was a mirror around, I could have seen my eyes go wide from the shock...

``Now, little miss shopkeeper.@k@vS19/06/500600346. Could you wrap up that doll in the window?@k@vS19/06/500600347. It's the first present from the person I've come to love, so make sure you tie it up nicely with a ribbon.``
Mion, completely flustered, was being cornered by a sly-faced Shion.
...My brain had stopped working.
``.........What... is going on...``

``Well, let's go!@k@vS19/06/500600349. Kei-chan!@k@vS19/06/500600350. It's already dark out, so I'll see you home.@k@vS19/06/500600351. Sis, sorry, but could you phone the house in Okinomiya and have them send out a car?``

``Like I said, I'm Shion Sonozaki.@k@vS19/06/660600242. Mion's younger sister.``
Shion said while facing Mion smugly.
``Ms. shopkeeper. Could I have that doll giftwrapped?@k@vS19/06/660600244. This is a gift from Kei-chan to me.``
``W-Whaaaaaat!?@k@vS19/03/660300211. Wait, Kei-chan!@k@vS19/03/660300212. Why the hell are you giving Shion a doll?!``
``..Ah, no... I mean... I thought you were 'Shion' this whole time, so... And I guess you're not and I figured something felt off, but... It was already too late... So...``
``Kei-chan, what are you mumbling about?@k@vS19/06/660600246. Didn't you just say that this is as thanks for everything up until now?!``
Shion looks at me with mischievous eyes.
``But that's... Because... I thought you were her...``
I become even more incoherent when I look at Mion, my eyes pleading for help.
However, Mion is even more panicked than I am.
``Um, Kei-chan... Does... Does that mean...``
``Do you really think everything up until now was Mion, then?``
``I-It wasn't......? Mion... You phoned me yesterday... Right?``
Mion shakes her head.

``Or was it my sister?@k@vS19/06/660600223. The person known as Mion Sonozaki put together a bento, and bravely went to a boy's home to deliver it, maybe?@k@vS19/06/660600224. Ohh, you're a lot bolder than you look, sis~!``

``See, Kei-chan.@k@vS19/06/660600226. My sister says she doesn't know.@k@vS19/06/660600255. So everything up until yesterday was me, Shion Sonozaki.``
Mion glared at Shion with deep resentment. Yet Shion acted nonchalantly, as if she doesn't care at all.
``You reap what you sow.@k@vS19/06/660600257. It's what you get for using my name as your own.``
``But you're using my name at your job, too!``
``That was unavoidable.@k@vS19/06/660600259. If I used my own name, that would cause all sorts of trouble for you.``
``Nobody forced you to get a job and need to lie about who you are!``
``What are you talking about?@k@vS19/06/660600261. You're the one who impersonated me and reaped all sorts of benefits.``
......Is this what they call a sisterly quarrel? It's a novel sight for me, as an only child.
Wait, this is no time to be admiring that! Just what's going on?! What is this?!
I could do nothing but stand there dumbfounded at the sight unfolding before my eyes.
It's impossible to get a say in without knowing when I can safely cut into their conversation.
If there was a mirror across from me, I would undoubtedly be staring at the wretched visage of someone in sheer panic.
``Well, let's go, Kei-chan!@k@vS19/06/660600263. It's already dark outside, so let me escort you back to your house.``
``Sis, I'm sorry, but could you call our house in Okinomiya to prepare a car for me?@k@vS19/06/660600265. Tell them to also bring a wagon along to carry a bicycle in.``
In contrast to Shion, who had glee written all over her face... Mion was an empty shell and looked like she could burst into tears at any moment.
I don't think I've ever seen Mion, who boasts of such overwhelming strength during club, cornered to this extent before...
After that, Mion's grumblings were unrelenting...
